== Notes for [[Item:Q116612|Q116612]] ==

http://genealogics.org/getperson.php?personID=I00140027&tree=LEO

''* (Note by George J. Homs: Besides the info below, other sources, including [http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ANGOULEME.htm#AinaPerigordMBosonILaMarche '''FMG'''], suggest that Emma's parents were Bernard d'Angoulême and Berthe)''

''* (Note by Justin Swanström: Daughter or sister of Bernard. Sources are split, but generally favor sister.)''

http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p64.htm

Emma, comtesse de Périgord[1]
*b. circa 900
*Father Wilhelm I, comte de Périgueux et d' Agen b. circa 860, d. circa 920
*Mother Regilindis de Neustrie b. between 860 and 865

Emma, comtesse de Périgord was born circa 900. She was the daughter of Wilhelm I, comte de Périgueux et d' Agen and Regilindis de Neustrie.

Emma, comtesse de Périgord married Boson I "le Vieil", comte de la Marche & de Perigord, son of Sulpice, comte en Limousin, abbé laïque de Charroux and N. N. de Limoges, in 944.[2]

Family
*Boson I "le Vieil", comte de la Marche & de Perigord b. circa 924, d. circa 968

Child
*1. Adalbert I, comte de la Marche & de Périgord+ b. c 945?, d. c 997

32nd great grandmother

_P_CCINFO 1-20792
Original individual @@P2447683511@@ (@@MS_NHFETTERLYFAMIL0@@) merged with @@P2447683513@@ (@@MS_NHFETTERLYFAMIL0@@)

#Générale##Générale#Comtesse de Périgord.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
